title: Pan-Seared Padron Peppers with Skillet
description: A comforting American dish featuring pan-seared Padron peppers and skillet ingredients.

ingredients.name: Padron Peppers
ingredients.notes: Select peppers that are slightly tender to the touch.

ingredients.name: Skillet
ingredients.notes: Use a preheated skillet for best results.

instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil to the preheated skillet and swirl to coat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add Padron peppers to the skillet and sear for 3-4 minutes per side.
Season peppers with salt and pepper to taste.
Continue to cook until peppers are tender and slightly charred.
Remove peppers from the skillet and serve hot.
